---
title: "VAR Predictability Benchmark"
subtitle: "Robustness Analyses"
author: 
 - name: Björn S. Siepe
   orcid: 0000-0002-9558-4648
   affiliations: University of Marburg
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
    fig-width: 7
    fig-height: 4.5
    fig-align: "center"
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
  eval: true
---

<!--
Read-only report. Robustness / sensitivity checks against the primary analysis.
Reads cached results; reruns are produced by changing cfg and re-fitting via make.
-->
